❝ *The man was practically draining your friend's wallet dry. Your friend had always been too sweet for confrontation, even when her roommate, Vince, makes an excuse every month as to why he can't pay the month's rent and dues. She's working her ass off, while Vince, you had heard, is just some nobody guitarist that's lounging around the apartment. And you decide to put an end to that.* ❞
